name: vibe-check
description: Anti-vibe-coding mentor. When AI writes code for you, Vibe Check turns it into a Duolingo-style quiz so you actually understand it.

commands.title: Vibe Check: Quiz Me On Selection
Vibe Check: Open Get Started Walkthrough

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Vibe Check
walkthroughs.description: Anti-vibe-coding mentor — set up in 60 seconds.

steps.title: 1 · Pick your AI provider
steps.description:
Vibe Check needs an LLM to turn AI-generated code into quizzes.

**In VS Code with Copilot?** Pick `copilot` — no API key needed.

**In Antigravity, Cursor, Windsurf, or VSCodium?** Pick a direct provider (Anthropic / Gemini / OpenAI / OpenRouter). These editors don't expose their built-in AI to extensions, so you'll need your own API key. The wizard walks you through getting one.

[Open Setup Wizard](command:vibeCheck.configureProvider)

steps.title: 2 · Pick your difficulty track
steps.description:
Three difficulty tracks, each with its own progress and streak:

- **Beginner** · 5 XP per correct — recognition and recall
- **Intermediate** · 10 XP per correct — applied logic, predict outputs
- **Expert** · 20 XP per correct — architecture, edge cases, trade-offs

Switch freely whenever you want a different challenge level.

[Pick a Track](command:vibeCheck.setTrack)

steps.title: 3 · Generate your first module
steps.description:
Three ways to create a module:

1. **Let it auto-fire.** When an AI agent inserts >5 lines into your editor, Vibe Check spawns a 5-lesson module automatically.
2. **Right-click selected code** in the editor → `Vibe Check: Quiz Me On Selection`.
3. **Open the sidebar** (🎓 mortarboard icon in the activity bar) and click **+ NEW**.

[Open Sidebar](command:workbench.view.extension.vibeCheck)

steps.title: 4 · Daily review — the secret sauce
steps.description:
Every question you answer enters a spaced-repetition queue (FSRS algorithm). Tomorrow Vibe Check asks you the trickiest ones again, the day after that the next-trickiest, and so on. This is what makes the knowledge actually stick.

Click **↻ START DUE REVIEW** in the sidebar when cards are due. Aim for 50 XP a day to keep your streak alive.

[Start a Review](command:vibeCheck.startReview)

steps.title: 5 · You're all set
steps.description:
That's it — close this walkthrough and let an AI agent write some code.

**Tips:**
- Click backtick code references in question prompts to jump to the source
- Wrong answer? Click **? WHY** for a personalized LLM explanation
- Customize via **Settings → search 'vibe check'**

Feedback / bugs: [GitHub issues](https://github.com/ekontoTURBO/vibe-check/issues)

vibeCheck.autoQuiz.description: Automatically generate a quiz when the Pulse Observer detects a large AI insertion. Turn off to be prompted before each quiz.

enumDescriptions: Auto: prefer Antigravity if hosted there, else Copilot, else any direct provider with a saved key.
VS Code language model API (requires GitHub Copilot subscription).
Antigravity built-in AI (only inside the Antigravity host).
Anthropic Claude direct (requires API key — see setup wizard).
Google Gemini direct (requires API key — see setup wizard).
OpenAI direct (requires API key — see setup wizard).
OpenRouter aggregator, ~100+ models behind one key (requires API key — see setup wizard).
vibeCheck.modelProvider.markdownDescription:
Which LLM backend Vibe Check uses.

**First time?** Open the Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`) and run **`Vibe Check: Configure Provider`** — it walks you through picking a provider, pasting an API key (if needed), and choosing a model in one go.

API keys are stored encrypted in VS Code SecretStorage — never in this `settings.json`.

vibeCheck.copilotModel.markdownDescription:
Model override for **Copilot** (e.g. `gpt-4o`, `claude-3.5-sonnet`). Leave empty to use the default.

📌 *Don't paste an API key here — this is for the model id only. Copilot uses your GitHub Copilot subscription, no API key needed.*

vibeCheck.antigravityModel.markdownDescription:
Model override for **Antigravity** (e.g. `gemini-3-flash`). Leave empty to use the default.

📌 *No API key needed — Antigravity provides the model when you run inside that host.*

vibeCheck.anthropicModel.markdownDescription:
Model override for **Anthropic** (e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-6`, `claude-opus-4-7`). Leave empty to use the default.

🔑 **API key setup**: get a key at [console.anthropic.com/settings/keys](https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys), then open the Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`) and run **`Vibe Check: Configure Provider`**. Your key is stored encrypted, never in this file.

📌 *Don't paste your API key into this field — this field is for the **model id** only.*

vibeCheck.geminiModel.markdownDescription:
Model override for **Gemini** (e.g. `gemini-2.5-flash`, `gemini-2.5-pro`, `gemini-3-flash-preview`). Leave empty to use the default (`gemini-2.5-flash`, free-tier accessible).

🔑 **API key setup**: get a key at [aistudio.google.com/app/apikey](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey), then open the Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`) and run **`Vibe Check: Configure Provider`**. Your key is stored encrypted, never in this file.

📌 *Don't paste your API key into this field — this field is for the **model id** only.*

vibeCheck.openaiModel.markdownDescription:
Model override for **OpenAI** (e.g. `gpt-5.5`, `gpt-5.4-mini`, `gpt-4o`). Leave empty to use the default.

🔑 **API key setup**: get a key at [platform.openai.com/api-keys](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys), then open the Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`) and run **`Vibe Check: Configure Provider`**. Your key is stored encrypted, never in this file.

📌 *Don't paste your API key into this field — this field is for the **model id** only.*

vibeCheck.openrouterModel.markdownDescription:
Model override for **OpenRouter** (e.g. `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6`, browse the [model catalog](https://openrouter.ai/models)). Leave empty to use the default.

🔑 **API key setup**: get a key at [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys), then open the Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`) and run **`Vibe Check: Configure Provider`**. Your key is stored encrypted, never in this file.

📌 *Don't paste your API key into this field — this field is for the **model id** only.*

vibeCheck.telemetry.enabled.markdownDescription:
Send **anonymous** usage events to help improve Vibe Check. **No code, no file contents, no API keys, no personally identifiable information** ever leave your machine. See [PRIVACY.md](https://github.com/ekontoTURBO/vibe-check/blob/main/PRIVACY.md) for the full list of fields.

- `null` (default): you'll be asked once on first activation
- `true`: send anonymous events
- `false`: never send anything

Vibe Check **also** honors VS Code's `telemetry.telemetryLevel` — if you have host telemetry off, no events are sent regardless of this setting.

vibeCheck.telemetry.endpoint.markdownDescription: **Advanced.** Override the telemetry endpoint URL (Supabase REST endpoint). Leave empty to use the default. Set to `disabled` to hard-disable transport regardless of consent.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
